tests.test_name: Technical Review renders and JSON is complete for QA Manager with bdd_datadriven_sample.feature
tests.description: Verifies that the Technical Review add-on produces complete, correctly structured output for a QA Manager analyzing a data-driven BDD test file.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The analysis output appears after submitting the test file for documentation and analysis
The output includes a clearly labeled Technical Review section
Each test case includes a technical quality assessment in the output
Each test case includes a maintainability risks assessment in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded JSON contains no placeholder or missing values

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test case has required technical review fields
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The JSON includes both technical_quality and maintainability_risks for every test case

tests.test_name: Technical Review batch mode covers all tests with no gaps or duplicates
tests.description: Verifies that when analyzing a large BDD test file, the Technical Review add-on processes every test case exactly once with no missing entries or repeated results.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The analysis output appears after submitting a large test file for documentation and analysis

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded JSON contains no placeholder or missing values across all batch-processed test cases

test_coverage.verification_step: No duplicate test names in technical review
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each test case appears only once in the output, confirming no duplication during batch processing

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test case has required technical review fields
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All test cases in the large file have both technical_quality and maintainability_risks populated, with no gaps
